oracle.note: Public API is Go; Python remains registration/SSO/captcha sidecars only.

admin_routes.registration_boundary: Go may call the external /internal/registration/v1 service and consume results; Go must not reimplement captcha/browser/email registration execution.

readiness.startup: Go app verifies PostgreSQL connectivity and applied migration checksums before /ready succeeds.
readiness.fail_closed: If shared stores, store backend, or migrations are not safe, /live stays up, /ready is 503, and mutating routes must be disabled.
readiness.no_auto_migrate: Application process verifies only; schema changes are applied by grok2api-migrate (Docker entrypoint runs it before exec, unless GROK2API_AUTO_MIGRATE=0).

data_safety.redis_role: hot state, TTL state, locks, sessions, and affinity only
data_safety.forbidden_go_write_pattern: full-table or full-map replacement for accounts, api_keys, account_pool, models, or settings
data_safety.required_write_pattern: row-level upsert/patch/delete with ownership and idempotency checks where applicable
data_safety.api_key_secret: enc:v1: ciphertext must be preserved unless Go can decrypt/re-encrypt with the configured secret material

anthropic_messages: tool_use stop only after emitted tool block

failover.allowed: before the first committed model content or tool payload; protocol envelopes may already be open
failover.forbidden: after committed model content or tool payload
